purpose: settings.save_graph_attributes_to_trace=true: 'graph-attribute-fact' rows enter the rule trace — the t=0 applications through the _update_node/_update_edge gates (interpretation.py:1538/:1657) plus one row per later timestep from the static-fact reapplication branches (interpretation.py:297 node / :373 edge; default-static graph facts re-append themselves at interpretation.py:340/:415) — so trace-node gains special(A) Fact rows, trace-edge gains rel(A,B) rows, and the trace-derived special/rel frames populate, while nodes-derived digest-equals the twin save-graph-attrs-to-trace-off (verified at authoring; the harness judges each case within one knob position): trace contents only, never derived bounds — the nondefault-true-include class.
provenance: spine case against docs/surface.md setting:save_graph_attributes_to_trace nondefault-true-include
